case_title: JONES, ROBERT SR VS TOM-EHLERS, BARBERA IND & DBA FLOOR FASHIONS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $944.00 FILED BY JONES, ROBERT SR AS TO DEFENDANT TOM-EHLERS, BARBERA IND & DBA FLOOR FASHIONS FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TOM-EHLERS, BARBERA IND & DBA FLOOR FASHIONS FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOM-EHLERS, BARBERA IND & DBA FLOOR FASHIONS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, ROBERT SR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOM-EHLERS, BARBERA IND & DBA FLOOR FASHIONS FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY $944.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $970.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: CORRESPONDENCE DTD 11-27-00 FROM TIM MCELROY/ FRONTIER PACIFIC VIA US.MAIL TO COMM. KAPLAN REC'D IN COURT.
CERT MAIL TO JEFFREY HAROWITZ, FRONTIER PACIFIC INS. CO. RETURNED SIGNED.
